<h1 class="has-text-align-center wp-block-heading">Welcome to Perfect Drive Sports Group</h1>
</div></div>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Perfect Drive Sports Group (PDSG) is Europe’s largest e-commerce company for golf equipment. It is the undisputed leading online retailer of golf equipment in the UK and the German speaking region.   </p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">With its two brands – Clubhouse Golf in the UK and All4Golf in Germany – PDSG is going to accelerate its international expansion as well as further drive organic growth in its respective home markets through continued investments into the online offering and marketing capabilities.</p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">It stocks the majority of leading golf brands and offers a direct-to-customer proposition centred around a bigger choice for better value with an industry leading service.   </p>



<p class="wp-block-paragraph">Across its two locations in Hannover and Manchester, the group has more than 150 employees.</p>



<hr class="wp-block-separator aligncenter is-style-wide"/>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-foreground-color has-text-color wp-block-paragraph" style="font-size:32px;line-height:1"><strong>Companies of the Perfect Drive Sports Group</strong></p>
